title: Final handoff complete after commit doctrine correction
body: Glassy Ebbing Reef completed the final session handoff after commit 7c589a0a. Updated repo-continuity, the Cloudflare MCP thread record, the agentic-engineering thread record, and napkin; entrypoints remain pointer-only; no new ADR/PDR candidate or deep-consolidation trigger surfaced. Closing claim 1d11be1d-8cfc-4aa4-9879-111cbd6905d4.
